measurement_note: Size is the engineer count n. Efficiencies are distinct and descending, while speeds follow a deterministic nonmonotone sequence; k=floor(n/2). The reference sorts once and maintains a size-k heap in O(n log n) time. A correct slower implementation sorts the complete speed prefix again at every efficiency threshold, taking O(n^2 log n) time; the 250/1000/4000-engineer tiers complete normally.
